modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about different account types on Coyote Card

full_description_text:  
User is asking about the various account types available on their Coyote Card.  
They specifically want to know what USD Print Debit means.  
This question arises while they are trying to understand their card options.  
There seems to be some confusion regarding the account types listed.
